name: I think my hearing went bad from machines at work, what happens if I win?

mainEntity.name: I think my hearing went bad from machines at work, what happens if I win?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**You'll receive benefits like medical treatment, wage replacement, hearing aids, and possible permanent disability payments.**

Successful claims cover ongoing costs and work limitations from NIHL.[1][3] No-fault workers' comp applies.

**Key factors:**
- Audiogram quantifying loss.[6]
- Approved treatments and accommodations.
- Vocational rehab if unemployable.
- Settlement for future needs.

Attorney negotiates full value; appeals denials.[2] Employer may provide aids directly.

Outcomes improve quality of life.
